description.value:
Send Medication data TA building blocks for patient H. XXX_Smit
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_medicatiegegevens_sturen_TA
Original description: KWAL Medicatiegegevens TA script 4
Send Medication data TA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '630586|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (DICLOFENAC NATRIUM AUROBINDO TABLET MSR 25MG)
